# growthbook_environments (Data Source)

Read all GrowthBook environments.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `environments` (Attributes List) All environments in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--environments))

<a id="nestedatt--environments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `environments`

Read-Only:

- `default_state` (Boolean) Default enabled state for new features.
- `description` (String) Environment description.
- `id` (String) Environment ID/name.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this environment is scoped to.
- `toggle_on_list` (Boolean) Whether shown on the feature list page.
